creator: Calvin Kang
source_text:
Nobu mid but not this - you better stand down   INGREDIENTS:
300g cod  30g miso paste  15g Sake 
1packet Splenda or 1 tsp sweetener  10g mirin 250g white rice cooked
Spring onion 
   for the whole bowl:
Cals: 664 kcal  Protein: 63.8 g Carbs: 84.2 g Fat: 4.7 g

#nobu #cod #blackcod
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output; the opening comment is not a supported recipe title and the caption has no method.
Accepted after semantic nutrition and ingredient context were excluded from name and ingredient leakage.
